Mississippi · State Licensing Reference

Speech-Language Pathologist
Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist (SLP) Guide

Issued by the Mississippi State Department of Health — Speech-Language Pathology under the Mississippi State Department of Health (MSDH). Data verified for 2026.

Visit Official Board Portal
Fees Board Contact License Types How to Apply Documents Telepractice Reciprocity FAQ
Total Initial Fee
$100
$100 application and license fee
Renewal
$50
Every year (December 31)
Processing Time
2 to 4 weeks
Subject to board volume
License Duration
1 year
From date of issuance
Board Contact

Mississippi State Department of Health — Speech-Language Pathology

Mailing Address

P.O. Box 1700, Jackson, MS 39215-1700

Physical Address

570 E. Woodrow Wilson Dr., Jackson, MS 39216

Phone & Fax

Phone: (601) 364-1100

Fax: (601) 364-5052

Email

licensure@msdh.ms.gov

Credential Categories

Mississippi SLP License Types

Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist

The full credential to independently practice speech-language pathology in Mississippi.

Provisional SLP License

Issued to SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

Application Process

How to Apply for a Mississippi Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist (SLP)

Earn a Master's Degree in SLP

Complete a master's degree from a CAA-accredited program.

Pass the Praxis Examination

Achieve a passing score on Praxis (test code 5331, score 162).

Complete Clinical Fellowship

Complete 36 weeks of supervised clinical practice (1,260 hours).

Submit Application to MSDH

Submit application with $100 fee.

Required Documents

Application Document Checklist

  • Official graduate transcriptsFrom a CAA-accredited program.
  • Praxis exam score reportScore of 162 or higher.
  • Clinical Fellowship verificationCF completion documentation.
  • Background checkCriminal background check.
Telepractice

Mississippi Telepractice Rules for SLPs

Telehealth Practice

Mississippi permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

Practice Laws

Provisional Practice & Reciprocity

Clinical Fellowship & Provisional Rules

Mississippi issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

Reciprocity & Endorsement

Mississippi is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

Frequently Asked Questions

Mississippi SLP FAQ

How much does a Mississippi SLP license cost?

$100 initial. $50 annual renewal.

Is Mississippi part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?

Yes.

Does Mississippi allow telepractice for SLPs?

Yes.
